text_raw: Ah... that {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_CountGrace:Name#Grace} rabble send you, did they?
text_clean: Ah... that {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_CountGrace:Name#Grace} rabble send you, did they?

text_raw: Ain't even had the chance to flaunt my fortune!
text_clean: Ain't even had the chance to flaunt my fortune!

text_raw: Always strutting about, calling themselves noble... nothing but swines!
text_clean: Always strutting about, calling themselves noble... nothing but swines!

text_raw: I'll strip them bare, nick every last thing while they're still blinking!
text_clean: I'll strip them bare, nick every last thing while they're still blinking!

text_raw:
Once we've slit the throats of the whole bloody lot,
they'll never dare look our way again!
text_clean:
Once we've slit the throats of the whole bloody lot,
they'll never dare look our way again!

text_raw: Coin. That's the only true power there is!
text_clean: Coin. That's the only true power there is!

text_raw: Those thick-headed nobles need wiping out!
text_clean: Those thick-headed nobles need wiping out!

text_raw: Think you can bring me down?
text_clean: Think you can bring me down?

text_raw: Getting a bit shaky now it's time to swing, eh?
text_clean: Getting a bit shaky now it's time to swing, eh?
